ScriptHookRDR2 (vendored runtime)

Obtain from Alexander Blade / dev-c (do not redistribute from this repo as a substitute for the official download):
  https://www.dev-c.com/rdr2/scripthookrdr2/

Place or refresh these files here after extracting the official runtime ZIP:
  ScriptHookRDR2.dll
  dinput8.dll

Version must match your Red Dead Redemption 2 game build.
